headline: Germany's Delivery Hero agrees 12.7-bn-euro takeover by Uber
summary: German food delivery group Delivery Hero said Thursday it has agreed to be taken over by US ride-hailing giant Uber in a 12.7-billion-euro ($14.6-billion) deal.Uber is offering 41.50 euros per share for Delivery Hero, valuing the deal at 12.7 billion euros.

content.title: Germany's Delivery Hero agrees 12.7-bn-euro takeover by Uber
content.summary: German food delivery group Delivery Hero said Thursday it has agreed to be taken over by US ride-hailing giant Uber in a 12.7-billion-euro ($14.6-billion) deal.Uber is offering 41.50 euros per share for Delivery Hero, valuing the deal at 12.7 billion euros.

thumbnail.caption: Founded in 2011, Delivery Hero now operates in over 60 markets and is one of the world's biggest food delivery groups  (John MACDOUGALL)

headline: Uber launches $14.8 billion offer for Delivery Hero to create global platform
summary: Uber on Thursday launched a public takeover offer for Delivery Hero that values the German food delivery company at $14.8 billion and would create the world's ‌largest food-delivery firm outside China.  The acquisition advances the U.S. ride-hailing firm's efforts to build a global ‌presence in the food-delivery business as it faces intensifying competition from rivals such as DoorDash, which has been expanding aggressively abroad.  Uber, which has made the acquisition conditional on a minimum acceptance threshold of 50% plus one share, will offer €41.50 ($47.58) in cash per share.

content.title: Uber launches $14.8 billion offer for Delivery Hero to create global platform
content.summary: Uber on Thursday launched a public takeover offer for Delivery Hero that values the German food delivery company at $14.8 billion and would create the world's ‌largest food-delivery firm outside China.  The acquisition advances the U.S. ride-hailing firm's efforts to build a global ‌presence in the food-delivery business as it faces intensifying competition from rivals such as DoorDash, which has been expanding aggressively abroad.  Uber, which has made the acquisition conditional on a minimum acceptance threshold of 50% plus one share, will offer €41.50 ($47.58) in cash per share.

headline: Uber to gobble up Delivery Hero in latest food delivery deal
summary:
US ride-hailing giant Uber has struck a 12.7-billion-euro ($14.6-billion) deal to take over German food delivery behemoth Delivery Hero, the latest consolidation in the industry, the companies said Thursday.- 'More opportunities' -
Uber is offering 41.50 euros per share for Delivery Hero -- above their price on Thursday of nearly 39 euros -- valuing the transaction at 12.7 billion euros.

headline: Uber launches $15 billion bid for Delivery Hero to create global takeout giant
summary: Uber launched a takeover bid for Delivery Hero on Thursday, giving the German firm a $14.8 billion equity value in a move that would create the largest food-delivery group outside China as competition with U.S. and European rivals heats up.  The acquisition advances ‌the U.S. ride-hailing firm's efforts to build a global food-delivery business as it faces intensifying competition from Just Eat, owned by Dutch group Prosus, ‌and U.S. rival DoorDash, which has been expanding aggressively.  The transaction, which is likely to face a complex regulatory process, would create a platform spanning 99 countries with combined pro-forma gross merchandise value (GMV) of $236 billion in ​2025, Delivery Hero said in a statement.

content.title: Uber launches $15 billion bid for Delivery Hero to create global takeout giant
content.summary: Uber launched a takeover bid for Delivery Hero on Thursday, giving the German firm a $14.8 billion equity value in a move that would create the largest food-delivery group outside China as competition with U.S. and European rivals heats up.  The acquisition advances ‌the U.S. ride-hailing firm's efforts to build a global food-delivery business as it faces intensifying competition from Just Eat, owned by Dutch group Prosus, ‌and U.S. rival DoorDash, which has been expanding aggressively.  The transaction, which is likely to face a complex regulatory process, would create a platform spanning 99 countries with combined pro-forma gross merchandise value (GMV) of $236 billion in ​2025, Delivery Hero said in a statement.

headline: Uber in $15 billion deal for Delivery Hero to create global takeout giant
summary: Uber agreed on Thursday to buy Germany's Delivery Hero at an equity value of $14.8 billion to create the largest food-delivery ‌group outside China and stave off intensifying competition from U.S. and European rivals.  It is likely to face a complex regulatory process as the combination would create a platform spanning 99 ​countries with combined pro-forma gross merchandise value (GMV) of $236 billion in 2025, according to a statement by Delivery Hero.  "Together, we'll nearly double the number of markets where we offer both mobility and delivery services," Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi said in the joint statement.

content.title: Uber in $15 billion deal for Delivery Hero to create global takeout giant
content.summary: Uber agreed on Thursday to buy Germany's Delivery Hero at an equity value of $14.8 billion to create the largest food-delivery ‌group outside China and stave off intensifying competition from U.S. and European rivals.  It is likely to face a complex regulatory process as the combination would create a platform spanning 99 ​countries with combined pro-forma gross merchandise value (GMV) of $236 billion in 2025, according to a statement by Delivery Hero.  "Together, we'll nearly double the number of markets where we offer both mobility and delivery services," Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi said in the joint statement.

headline: Uber bids $15 billion for Delivery Hero to form global takeout giant
summary:
STORY: Uber launched a takeover bid for Delivery Hero on Thursday.

It gave the German firm a $14.8 billion equity value.

Were a deal to go ahead it would create the largest food-delivery group outside China.

And it comes as competition with U.S. and European rivals heats up.

An acquisition would further the U.S. ride-hailing firm's efforts to build a global food-delivery business.

It's facing growing competition from Just Eat, which is owned by Dutch group Prosus.

And its U.S. rival DoorDash, which has expanded aggressively.

Delivery Hero said Wednesday it would create a platform covering 99 countries

and would have a combined pro-forma gross merchandise value (or GMV) of $236 billion last year.

China's giant Meituan recorded a platform GMV of about $246.5 billion last year.

Uber said the venture could nearly double the number of markets the company offers.

The transaction is supported by Delivery Hero's management and supervisory board.

It's expected to be completed in the second half of next year.

However, analysts believe the transaction would still likely face a complex regulatory process due to overlap in the companies' presence in various markets.

content.title: Uber bids $15 billion for Delivery Hero to form global takeout giant
content.summary:
STORY: Uber launched a takeover bid for Delivery Hero on Thursday.

It gave the German firm a $14.8 billion equity value.

Were a deal to go ahead it would create the largest food-delivery group outside China.

And it comes as competition with U.S. and European rivals heats up.

An acquisition would further the U.S. ride-hailing firm's efforts to build a global food-delivery business.

It's facing growing competition from Just Eat, which is owned by Dutch group Prosus.

And its U.S. rival DoorDash, which has expanded aggressively.

Delivery Hero said Wednesday it would create a platform covering 99 countries

and would have a combined pro-forma gross merchandise value (or GMV) of $236 billion last year.

China's giant Meituan recorded a platform GMV of about $246.5 billion last year.

Uber said the venture could nearly double the number of markets the company offers.

The transaction is supported by Delivery Hero's management and supervisory board.

It's expected to be completed in the second half of next year.

However, analysts believe the transaction would still likely face a complex regulatory process due to overlap in the companies' presence in various markets.

headline: Uber's $14.8 Billion Delivery Hero Deal Expands Global Reach to 99 Markets
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER), a U.S. ride-hailing company with a food-delivery business, has agreed to acquire Delivery Hero (DELHY), a German food-delivery company operating across international markets, in a transaction valuing the business at $14.8 billion.  Uber will offer 41.50, or about $47.60, for each Delivery Hero share and acquire its operations across 50 markets, subject to regulatory approval.  The offer represents a roughly 26% increase from Uber's original 33-per-share proposal in May. Delivery Hero shares have gained about 68% this year and were little changed at 38.28 in Frankfurt on Thursday, while Uber shares rose slightly to $73.42 before trading opened in New York.

content.title: Uber's $14.8 Billion Delivery Hero Deal Expands Global Reach to 99 Markets
content.summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER), a U.S. ride-hailing company with a food-delivery business, has agreed to acquire Delivery Hero (DELHY), a German food-delivery company operating across international markets, in a transaction valuing the business at $14.8 billion.  Uber will offer 41.50, or about $47.60, for each Delivery Hero share and acquire its operations across 50 markets, subject to regulatory approval.  The offer represents a roughly 26% increase from Uber's original 33-per-share proposal in May. Delivery Hero shares have gained about 68% this year and were little changed at 38.28 in Frankfurt on Thursday, while Uber shares rose slightly to $73.42 before trading opened in New York.
